summary: Recent B.E. Electronics and Communication Engineering graduate with hands-on experience in EDA tool development through internships at Synopsys (UART Transactor development in C++ for Zebu emulator), Nvidia (STA automation with Perl scripts), and Jabil (test equipment setup). Skilled in Python, C++, Perl, and scripting for automation, with exposure to Synopsys flows, seeking to contribute to an EDA Software Engineer role.

experience.title: Technical Engineer Apprentice
bullets: Development of UART Transactor for Zebu emulator using C++
Protocol functionality enhancements for Zebu Transactors using C++
Development of HW/SW Testbench Backwards Compatibility Agent and Script for Zebu Transactors with added AI Code review

experience.title: ASIC Engineer Intern (here)
bullets: Timing Closure and Performance Optimisation for Advanced SoC Designs using Static Timing Analysis (STA)
Perl Scripts for Automating STA report analysis
Manual fixes for clock transition and crosstalk violations

experience.company: Jabil Circuit India Private Limited Pune
experience.title: Test Engineer Intern (here)
bullets: Working, Debugging and Testing of Ericsson’s 5G Radio Transceiver - AIR3268
SMT Process of Ericsson AIR 3268 Transceiver PCBA
Setup, measurement, and calibration of Keysight test equipment

projects.name: Development and Implementation of a 5G Modem using an FPGA Board
bullets: FM Broadcast and Radio using Adalm-Pluto SDR🔗
Hardware-in-the-Loop Simulation of FFT on Kintex-7 KC705 FPGA Development Board
Simulink Model Development, FPGA implementation of 5G transceiver using Vitis Model Composer

projects.name: Robosoccer Bot
bullets: Built an RC-controlled bot using a laser-cut metal chassis, Sabertooth motor driver, and geared motors

projects.name: Test Data Compression for System-on-a-Chip Using Huffman Codes April 2024
bullets: Implementation of Huffman Codes for data compression using Xilinx Vivado

projects.name: Smart Irrigation System
bullets: Worked on a smart irrigation system for flood-irrigated paddy fields using IoT-based systems as group leader.
Used ESP-32 microcontroller, nRF24L01 RF module, GSM SIM800A, and BME280 & Thingspeak IoT Cloud.
Worked on water conservation by automating water flow and alerting the farmer about the weather.

education.institution: THAPAR INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY Patiala
